right: Destroying one of the Hulk’s legs (500 HP + 500 Const) downs the entity, which puts the Main into Constitution (0), creating a 0 HP "zombie" Hulk. Any further damage inflicted to the Main will kill the Hulk.

Destroying one of the Hulk’s legs (500 HP + 500 Const) downs the entity, which puts the Main into Constitution (0), creating a 0 HP "zombie" Hulk. Any further damage inflicted to the Main will kill the Hulk.

description.right: Elite unit equipped with a large plasma cannon, capable of direct & mortar fire, usually accompanies hordes of Voteless.
Elite unit equipped with automatic plasma rifles and jet-packs, usually accompanies hordes of Voteless.
An amalgamation of Voteless corpses, this large Illuminate unit specializes in close quarters combat and charges at Helldivers to attack.
Medium size defenses often found at Illuminate Encampments and Illuminate exclusive Objectives in Megacities.
Massive autonomous tripod with an energy shield and a large laser weapon. Can also use arc weaponry in close-quarters.

right: * The shield is immune to all statuses. ** Recharge delay : 12 | Broken recharge delay : 12 | Recharge rate : 2000.

description.right: Tank-armored flying Illuminate unit, armed with large plasma cannons and bomb droppers.
Static tesla type defenses often found at Illuminate Encampments and Illuminate exclusive Objectives.
Elite unit equipped with an energy shield and a deadly lance capable of launching an explosive projectile, usually accompanies hordes of Voteless.
Flying Illuminate unit that deploys strafing runs against Helldivers, dealing massive damage over a large area.
Transport aircraft used for deploying reinforcements for the Illuminate.

right: * The shield is immune to all statuses. ** Recharge delay : 1 | Broken recharge delay : 15 | Recharge rate : 200.

description.right: Flying drone equipped with arc weaponry and the ability to call for reinforcements.
